issue.message: This argument is a new instance so `stopService` will not remove anything
This argument is a new instance so `stopService` will not remove anything
Field requires API level 31 (current min is 26): `android.Manifest.permission#BLUETOOTH_CONNECT`
Field requires API level 31 (current min is 26): `android.Manifest.permission#BLUETOOTH_SCAN`
Call requires API level 29 (current min is 26): `android.app.AppOpsManager#unsafeCheckOpNoThrow`
Attribute `usesPermissionFlags` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `previewLayout` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
A newer version of androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences than 1.1.7 is available: 1.2.1
A newer version of androidx.work:work-runtime-ktx than 2.11.0 is available: 2.11.2
A newer version of androidx.hilt:hilt-work than 1.2.0 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.hilt:hilt-compiler than 1.2.0 is available: 1.3.0
Formatting %d followed by words ("dangerous"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("apps"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("sideloaded"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("ffline"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("threats"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("high"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("apps"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("trackers"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="security_trackers_format">%1$d trackers found across all apps</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("more"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("app"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="permission_changes_count_format">%1$d app(s) have changed permissions since last scan</string>

issue.message: Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
